channel.title: Second Creature by Oritsemughone
channel.description: Updates from Second Creature, a bulletin on cyberfeminism and love.

image.title: Logo
image.description: A square-shaped mosaic with 16 dark blue tiles

item.title: ▓ A New Sign-Up Page!
item.description: Second Creature, a bimonthly cyberfeminist newsletter beamed out to you from the Lagos metropolitan biome.
